message:
test(bd-9chy.47): add path edge cases for fopen test suite

- Add fopen_path_with_embedded_null_truncates: verifies C string
  truncation at embedded null byte (path "/tmp\0bogus" becomes "/tmp")

- Add fopen_null_path_fails: verifies NULL path returns NULL with
  EINVAL or EFAULT errno

- Remove double-close test: glibc vtable validation prevents testing
  in non-LD_PRELOAD environment (documented for LD_PRELOAD tests)

Ref: bd-9chy.47

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
